screening_answers.cover_letter_default: I am Dr. Avraham (Avi) Lalum, Attorney, Legal Educator, and AI Law Researcher with over 20 years of legal practice and a PhD in Law & Economics from the University of Córdoba. I specialize in the intersection of artificial intelligence, law, and economics — including explainable AI, algorithmic decision-making, autonomous systems liability, and AI governance frameworks. I have developed and delivered university courses and keynote lectures on AI & Law across Israel, Spain, and internationally, and have published peer-reviewed research in Scopus-indexed journals on AI-based risk modeling. I am excited to apply my unique combination of rigorous legal scholarship, deep AI understanding, and practical advocacy experience to this position.
